name: Hunting Nazi Treasure
overview: This exciting series chronicles one of the greatest heists in history and the present-day efforts to locate valuable objects and artwork stolen by the Nazis at the end of World War II and return them to their rightful owners. With hundreds of thousands of items worth billions still missing to this day, the series reveals what was stolen, how it was stolen, and leads the hunt for this lost treasure.

trailers.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure | Premieres Tuesday, Oct. 24th at 10 E/P
